name: prostate MRI — measurement in Impression not in Findings

report.findings: Peripheral zone: focal lesion in the right posterolateral mid gland (sector 7) with restricted diffusion and early enhancement. Transition zone: BPH. Seminal vesicles: no invasion. Lymph nodes: no adenopathy. Bones: no suspicious lesion.
report.impression:
1. 14 mm right posterolateral peripheral zone lesion, PI-RADS 5.
2. No seminal vesicle invasion.
